description_long: This helmet features a smooth, rounded shell with a pronounced, elongated crest that curves forward, reminiscent of ancient Greek or Roman designs. The surface is highly reflective with a metallic bronze or brass finish, giving it a polished and striking appearance. The front of the helmet has a large, open face area with a prominent nose guard and cheek cutouts, providing both protection and visibility. The sides are sculpted with deep cutaways, and the rear extends downward to cover the back of the head and neck. There are no visible ventilation holes, graphic designs, or brand logos on the exterior. The overall form is streamlined and elegant, suggesting ceremonial or decorative use rather than modern safety standards.
description: A polished, bronze-colored helmet with a high crest and open face, featuring smooth, reflective surfaces and sculpted cheek and neck protection.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the elongated crest and the downward extension covering the back of the head, with the open face area not visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the pronounced forward-curving crest, large open face area, and sculpted cheek cutout.
description_view_2: The front view displays the open face area, nose guard, and symmetrical cheek cutouts, with the crest visible at the top.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the crest, open face, and cheek cutout, with the reflective surface catching the light.
